case_title: CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A. VS. DENIZ M TWELYES et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-01-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor objection filed, the court ordered the case dismissed. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2011 Continued To Jun-01-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 6/1/2011 at 1:30 PM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
